# BP-109 positive variant: an aliased Gin context still continues after an error.
lang: go
file: BP-109-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: gin
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	gin "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func update(ctx *gin.Context) {
	if err := updateRecord(); err != nil {
		ctx.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
	}
	ctx.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"updated": true})
}

func updateRecord() error { return nil }
